title: brain git verify — --json success output
description: Convergent manifest↔index repair plus anchor validation over the open-run and audit surface. Reconciles each run's manifest against its index state, validates run anchors, and checks the audit surface (audit_intents ↔ refs/audit/runs per §2.8, watermark coverage, WORM-anchor head/count). It repairs what it deterministically can and reports the rest; any unrepairable divergence ⇒ exit 1. `convergent` MUST be true iff `divergences` is empty (enforced by the top-level conditionals). Exit 0 when convergent, 1 on any unrepairable divergence.

convergent.description: True when the manifest/index/anchor/audit surface fully converged (all divergences repaired, none unrepairable). MUST be true iff `divergences` is empty.

repaired.description: Divergences that were deterministically repaired during this run.

kind.description: The class of divergence that was repaired.
The class of unrepairable divergence detected.

divergences.detail: WORM-anchor head count mismatch; manual intervention required

x-atlas-contract.summary: Convergent manifest↔index repair + anchor/audit-surface validation (audit_intents↔refs/audit/runs §2.8, watermark coverage, WORM-anchor head/count); repairs what it can, unrepairable divergence ⇒ exit 1.
sideEffects: deterministic convergent repair of manifest↔index drift (idempotent)
prohibitedEffects: never fabricates or destroys audit anchors — repairs only deterministic drift

errorCodes.when: one or more unrepairable divergences were found
the vault repo is missing or unreadable
